title: Bandits
description: Ever wanted to get robbed in Minecraft?
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/c9-eYFK71Pg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

A mod that allows you to get robbed by stray villagers. They will spawn naturally throughout the world at night.

Requires Fabric API (If using Fabric)
